name: skill emits one eval dataset entry per file in the diff with before and after fixtures
command:
mkdir -p pr && printf 'diff --git a/x.js b/x.js
--- a/x.js
+++ b/x.js
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-eval(s)
+safeParse(s)
diff --git a/y.js b/y.js
--- a/y.js
+++ b/y.js
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-eval(t)
+safeParse(t)
' > pr/diff.patch && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/pr-to-eval-dataset/extract.sh" --diff pr/diff.patch --emit dataset --out dataset.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ "$(wc -l < dataset.jsonl)" = "2" ] && grep -q '"file":"x.js"' dataset.jsonl && grep -q '"file":"y.js"' dataset.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
